subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Your letter brought joy to hearts, for it spoke of attraction and the burning fire of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان تحریر سبب تسریر قلوب گردید زیرا ناطق بانجذاب و فوران نار
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God
